inputs.label: Temel Geçiş Ücreti (TL/km)

inputs.label: Aks/Köprü Çarpanı

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier by number of axles or class (e.g., 2 axles: 1.0, 3 axles: 1.5, 4 axles: 2.0)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aks sayısı veya sınıfına göre çarpan (örn. 2 aks:1.0, 3 aks:1.5, 4 aks:2.0)
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator nach Achsenzahl oder -klasse (z. B. 2 Achsen: 1,0, 3 Achsen: 1,5, 4 Achsen: 2,0)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient selon le nombre d'essieux ou la classe (ex. 2 essieux:1.0, 3 essieux:1.5, 4 essieux:2.0)
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador según número de ejes o clase (ej. 2 ejes:1.0, 3 ejes:1.5, 4 ejes:2.0)

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed bridge/highway entry fee if applicable
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais d'entrée fixes pour pont/autoroute, le cas échéant

inputs.label: Ağırlık Faktörü

businessContext_i18n.en: Environmental or infrastructure contribution multiplier based on vehicle weight (e.g., >10 tons)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Araç ağırlığına bağlı çevresel veya altyapı katkı çarpanı (örn. >10 ton)

businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de taxe sur la valeur ajoutée appliqué
